lines.text: ❯ explain what a goroutine is. use headings, bullet points, and a code example in your response.

lines.text: - A goroutine is a lightweight, concurrent function execution managed by the Go runtime — not by the OS.

lines.text: - The Go runtime multiplexes goroutines onto a small pool of OS threads(M:Nscheduling).
